questions.statement:
<p><span style="font-weight: 700;">Directions: In the following question, out of the four alternatives, choose the one which can be substituted for the given words/ sentence</span></p>

<p>Attractively old-fashioned.</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word.&nbsp;</strong></p>

<p>Carnage&nbsp;</p>

<p><strong>In the following question, out of the given four alternatives, select the alternative which best expresses the meaning of the Idiom/Phrase.</strong></p>

<p>A drop in the ocean</p>
options: To talk uselessly and be tired /
A quantity too small to make an impact /

questions.statement: Select the most appropriate synonym of the word given in brackets to fill in the blank. His best friend _______ (disclose) his business secrets in the press conference.

<p><span style="font-weight: 700;">Select the word which means the same as a group of words given.</span></p>

<div>A piece of enclosed land planted with fruit trees</div>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate &#39;one word &#39; for the expressions given below.</strong></p>

<p>Done, occurring, or active at night.</p>

<p>Choose the idiom/phrase that can substitute the highlighted group of words meaningfully.</p>

<p>I&#39;ll <u>take the risk</u> and predict that our team will win the championship this year.</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. </strong></p>

<p>PROLIFIC</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the following word.</strong></p>

<p>Ardent</p>
